identity.title: First Order Lowpass
identity.supported_scope: pure voltage-domain event-driven transient behavioral Verilog-A

parameters.name: alpha
parameters.override_behavior: sets the fraction of input error applied on each update

properties.observable_contract: vout begins at 0 V before the first periodic update.
The internal output updates only on the public 500 ps periodic schedule using y := y + alpha*(vin-y).
For a positive input step, vout is monotone and bounded by the input level.
The step response is slower than an instantaneous copy of vin.

modeling_constraints: Use deterministic voltage-domain behavior with a 500 ps periodic update.
Do not use current contributions, ddt(), idt(), undeclared artifacts, debug outputs, or validation state.
